# Best AI Writing Tools for Press Releases in 2026

Press releases need to be professional, newsworthy, and perfectly formatted. AI tools help you write compelling press releases that get picked up!

Check out our [[link:/category/Writing|Writing category]] for more AI tools.

---

## [[link:/tools/23|Rytr]]: Press Release Templates

[[link:/tools/23|Rytr]] has professional press release templates ready to use.

### Rytr for Press Releases
- **AP style templates**: Follow journalistic standards
- **Newsworthy angles**: Find the story in your news
- **Professional tone**: Sound credible and authoritative

**Try Rytr Free**: {{AFFILIATE_RYTR}}

---

## Grammarly: Professional Editing

Grammarly ensures your press release is perfect.

### Grammarly for Press Releases
- **Error-free writing**: No typos or mistakes
- **Professional tone**: Maintain journalistic standards
- **Clarity improvements**: Make your news easy to understand

**Try Grammarly**: {{AFFILIATE_GRAMMARLY}}
